snippets.description: CancelOperation cancels the specified operation.
snippets.title: container CancelOperation Sample

snippets.description:
CheckAutopilotCompatibility checks the cluster compatibility with Autopilot mode, and returns a list of
compatibility issues.
snippets.title: container CheckAutopilotCompatibility Sample

snippets.description: CompleteIPRotation completes master IP rotation.
snippets.title: container CompleteIPRotation Sample

snippets.description:
CompleteNodePoolUpgrade completeNodePoolUpgrade will signal an on-going node pool upgrade to
complete.
snippets.title: container CompleteNodePoolUpgrade Sample

snippets.description:
CreateCluster creates a cluster, consisting of the specified number and type of Google
Compute Engine instances.

By default, the cluster is created in the project's
[default
network](https: //cloud.google.com/compute/docs/networks-and-firewalls#networks).

One firewall is added for the cluster. After cluster creation,
the kubelet creates routes for each node to allow the containers
on that node to communicate with all other instances in the
cluster.

Finally, an entry is added to the project's global metadata indicating
which CIDR range the cluster is using.
snippets.title: container CreateCluster Sample

snippets.description: CreateNodePool creates a node pool for a cluster.
snippets.title: container CreateNodePool Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteCluster deletes the cluster, including the Kubernetes endpoint and all worker
nodes.

Firewalls and routes that were configured during cluster creation
are also deleted.

Other Google Compute Engine resources that might be in use by the cluster,
such as load balancer resources, are not deleted if they weren't present
when the cluster was initially created.
snippets.title: container DeleteCluster Sample

snippets.description: DeleteNodePool deletes a node pool from a cluster.
snippets.title: container DeleteNodePool Sample

snippets.description: FetchClusterUpgradeInfo fetch upgrade information of a specific cluster.
snippets.title: container FetchClusterUpgradeInfo Sample

snippets.description: FetchNodePoolUpgradeInfo fetch upgrade information of a specific nodepool.
snippets.title: container FetchNodePoolUpgradeInfo Sample

snippets.description: GetCluster gets the details of a specific cluster.
snippets.title: container GetCluster Sample

snippets.description:
GetJSONWebKeys gets the public component of the cluster signing keys in
JSON Web Key format.
snippets.title: container GetJSONWebKeys Sample

snippets.description: GetNodePool retrieves the requested node pool.
snippets.title: container GetNodePool Sample

snippets.description: GetOperation gets the specified operation.
snippets.title: container GetOperation Sample

snippets.description: GetServerConfig returns configuration info about the Google Kubernetes Engine service.
snippets.title: container GetServerConfig Sample

snippets.description:
ListClusters lists all clusters owned by a project in either the specified zone or all
zones.
snippets.title: container ListClusters Sample

snippets.description: ListNodePools lists the node pools for a cluster.
snippets.title: container ListNodePools Sample

snippets.description: ListOperations lists all operations in a project in a specific zone or all zones.
snippets.title: container ListOperations Sample

snippets.description: ListUsableSubnetworks lists subnetworks that are usable for creating clusters in a project.
snippets.title: container ListUsableSubnetworks Sample

snippets.description:
RollbackNodePoolUpgrade rolls back a previously Aborted or Failed NodePool upgrade.
This makes no changes if the last upgrade successfully completed.
snippets.title: container RollbackNodePoolUpgrade Sample

snippets.description: SetAddonsConfig sets the addons for a specific cluster.
snippets.title: container SetAddonsConfig Sample

snippets.description: SetLabels sets labels on a cluster.
snippets.title: container SetLabels Sample

snippets.description: SetLegacyAbac enables or disables the ABAC authorization mechanism on a cluster.
snippets.title: container SetLegacyAbac Sample

snippets.description:
SetLocations sets the locations for a specific cluster.
Deprecated. Use
[projects.locations.clusters.update](https: //cloud.google.com/kubernetes-engine/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.clusters/update)
instead.


Deprecated: SetLocations may be removed in a future version.
snippets.title: container SetLocations Sample

snippets.description: SetLoggingService sets the logging service for a specific cluster.
snippets.title: container SetLoggingService Sample

snippets.description: SetMaintenancePolicy sets the maintenance policy for a cluster.
snippets.title: container SetMaintenancePolicy Sample

snippets.description:
SetMasterAuth sets master auth materials. Currently supports changing the admin password
or a specific cluster, either via password generation or explicitly setting
the password.
snippets.title: container SetMasterAuth Sample

snippets.description: SetMonitoringService sets the monitoring service for a specific cluster.
snippets.title: container SetMonitoringService Sample

snippets.description: SetNetworkPolicy enables or disables Network Policy for a cluster.
snippets.title: container SetNetworkPolicy Sample

snippets.description: SetNodePoolAutoscaling sets the autoscaling settings for the specified node pool.
snippets.title: container SetNodePoolAutoscaling Sample

snippets.description: SetNodePoolManagement sets the NodeManagement options for a node pool.
snippets.title: container SetNodePoolManagement Sample

snippets.description:
SetNodePoolSize sets the size for a specific node pool. The new size will be used for all
replicas, including future replicas created by modifying
[NodePool.locations][google.container.v1.NodePool.locations].
snippets.title: container SetNodePoolSize Sample

snippets.description: StartIPRotation starts master IP rotation.
snippets.title: container StartIPRotation Sample

snippets.description: UpdateCluster updates the settings of a specific cluster.
snippets.title: container UpdateCluster Sample

snippets.description: UpdateMaster updates the master for a specific cluster.
snippets.title: container UpdateMaster Sample

snippets.description: UpdateNodePool updates the version and/or image type for the specified node pool.
snippets.title: container UpdateNodePool Sample
